name: Asus Rog Strix B650-A Gaming (Wifi)
highlights: ROG STRIX B650-A GAMING WIFI is a high-performance ATX motherboard built for AMD Ryzen™ 9000, 8000, and 7000 series desktop processors
Equipped with DDR5 support up to 192GB, PCIe 5
5Gb Ethernet, it delivers top-tier speed and connectivity for serious gamers and PC enthusiasts
description: Asus Rog Strix B650-A Gaming (Wifi) Price in Pakistan Category Details Model ROG STRIX B650-A GAMING WIFI CPU Support AMD AM5 Socket for Ryzen™ 9000, 8000, 7000 series Chipset AMD B650 Memory 4 x DIMM, up to 192GB DDR5 (OC 7600+), Dual Channel, ECC/Non-ECC Graphics Output 1 x HDMI 2.1 (4K@60Hz), 1 x DisplayPort 1.4 (8K@60Hz) Expansion Slots – 2 x PCIe 4.0 x16 slots (config varies by CPU) – 2 x PCIe 4.0 x1 slots Storage – 3 x M.2 (PCIe 5.0/4.0 support based on CPU) – 4 x S
